description: Sentiment classification probes. Sentence to positive/negative.
author: verbum

probes.prompt: The sunset was absolutely gorgeous tonight.
The food was terrible and the service was slow.
Although the movie started slow, the incredible performances and surprising plot twist made it one of the best films I have seen this year.
I had high expectations for this restaurant given the reviews, but the overcooked steak and rude waiter completely ruined the evening.
The hotel room was clean but tiny, and while the staff was friendly, the noise from the street made it impossible to sleep.
